reason: Tests assert exact code strings with specific variable names (pi, nkExisting, PathInfo, newIdx, existingIdx) in test_media_type_suffix_comparison_logic and test_slices_import_added. The behavior_in_task_description rubric fails because these specifics aren't in the instruction; no_solution_leakage fails because mentioning them would dictating exact fix; instruction_no_hint_leakage fails because variable names reveal solution shape. solution_uniqueness_guard fails because any correct solution using different variable names would fail these text-matching tests. tests_verify_behavior_not_text fails because these tests check code strings rather than behavior. The irreconcilable conflict is that the tests require exact code string matching while the instruction must not mention those exact strings — this cannot be resolved without rewriting the tests.
